message:
fix(tree): use parent-child deps for hierarchy and Unicode box-drawing (#5)

The Tree view (T) was rendering as a flat list because it used blocking
dependencies to determine hierarchy. Parent-child relationships are the
correct dependency type for nesting.

Changes:
- Build tree using parent-child dependencies (is_parent_child()) to
  find roots and children, matching the legacy bv behavior
- Fall back to blocking-based hierarchy when no parent-child deps exist
- Replace ASCII tree characters (|-, `-, |) with proper Unicode
  box-drawing characters (├──, └──, │) for cleaner visual hierarchy

The tree now properly nests children under their parent issues with
indentation, matching the hierarchical view from the legacy Go bv tool.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
